name: Ricotta Cheese Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat together the ricotta, egg yolks, sugar, and flour in a bowl.
2. Stir in the vanilla.
3. In another clean bowl, beat the egg whites until they form soft peaks with a pinch of salt.
4. Gently fold the beaten egg whites into the ricotta mixture.
5. Heat a griddle or frying pan over moderate to high heat and grease it lightly.
6. Spoon 2- to 3-inch portions of batter onto the hot griddle.
7. Cook each pancake for about 2 to 3 minutes on one side, then flip carefully and cook for another 2 to 3 minutes on the other side until golden brown.
8. Serve immediately with fruit.
